summary: Mesonephros forms parts of the male reproductive tract including the vas deferens, epididymis, and paroophoron. In contrast, glomeruli arise from the metanephros through ureteric bud-induction mechanisms and thus are not derived from the mesonephros.

In contrast, glomeruli arise from the metanephros through ureteric bud-induction mechanisms and thus are not derived from the mesonephros.. Answer choice: D
